docket_entries.docketEntryComment: /CAL: 1369PC REPORT FROM DR WORNIAN/X: THE PARTIES SUBMIT ON THE REPOR FROM DR WORNIAN,/X: THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT IS NOT COMPETENT TO STAND TRIAL,/CONTD PLACEMENT RPT PC 1370A2A/TEXT: DEFT IS REFD TO CONREP FOR EVALUATION PURS 1370(A)(2)(A)/1370DR/1370REF1/X:  PURSUANT TO PC 1370(A)(2)(A), COURT APPOINTS GOLDEN GATE CONDITIONAL RELEASE PROGRAM TO EVALUATE THE DEFENDANT AND SUBMIT TO THE COURT WITHIN 15 JUDICIAL DAYS OF THE ORDER A WRITTEN RECOMMENDATION AS TO WHETHER THE DEFENDANT SHOULD BE REQUIRED TO UNDERGO OUTPATIENT TREATMENT, OR COMMITTED TO A STATE HOSPITAL OR TO ANY OTHER TREATMENT FACILITY,/1370,01MED/DEFTCUST: COJ1/1370REF3/SIGN2/
